contents:
[package]
name = "nomina"
version = "0.0.5"
authors = [ "RakuJa",]
edition = "2024"
rust-version = "1.85.1"
description = "Biased name generator"
readme = "README.md"
homepage = "https://github.com/RakuJa/nomina"
repository = "https://github.com/RakuJa/nomina"
license = "EUPL-1.2"
keywords = [ "fantasy", "pathfinder", "name", "generator", "markov",]
publish = false

[lib]
name = "nomina"
path = "src/lib.rs"

[dependencies]
nanorand = "0.8.0"

[dev-dependencies]
rstest = "0.26.1"
proptest = "1.8.0"

[features]
default = [ "capitalizer",]
capitalizer = [ "dep:capitalize", "dep:itertools",]

[lints.rust]
unsafe_code = "forbid"
deprecated = "allow"

[dependencies.capitalize]
version = "0.3.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.itertools]
version = "0.14.0"
optional = true

[lints.clippy.struct_field_names]
level = "allow"
priority = 2

[lints.clippy.module_name_repetitions]
level = "allow"
priority = 2

[lints.clippy.cast_possible_truncation]
level = "allow"
priority = 2

[lints.clippy.cast_precision_loss]
level = "allow"
priority = 2

[lints.clippy.future_not_send]
level = "allow"
priority = 2

[lints.clippy.pedantic]
level = "warn"
priority = 1

[lints.clippy.nursery]
level = "warn"
priority = 1

[lints.clippy.unwrap_used]
level = "warn"
priority = 1
